_meta.source: Port pin and bbox researched from MSC published materials + user-supplied island map photo (2026-05-21). POI lat/lons not yet sourced — poi_ids array intentionally empty pending on-cay GPS data.

bbox_hint.note: MSC Cruises' private island in the Bimini chain of the Bahamas, approximately 65 miles east of Miami and 20 miles north of Bimini. Fish-shaped cay running roughly north-south with the cruise pier on the east side.
